meta.defaultTitle: Fire Advisor — Fire Safety System Design & Maintenance in Bulgaria
meta.defaultDescription: Design, installation and maintenance of fire safety systems. 8+ years of experience, based in Plovdiv, serving clients across Bulgaria.

footer.tagline: Design, installation and maintenance of fire safety systems across Bulgaria.

home.heroTitle: Fire safety system design and installation by a licensed engineering team
home.heroSubtitle: 8+ years of hands-on experience, a KIIP-registered engineer licensed by the National Fire Safety Directorate (ГДПБЗН) to maintain active fire safety measures — detection & extinguishing, smoke/heat extraction. Based in Plovdiv, serving clients across Bulgaria.
home.whyUsSubtitle: Three things our clients rely on.
home.whyUsLicensedText: KIIP member, licensed by the National Fire Safety Directorate — we work by the book, not by guesswork.
home.whyUsCoverageText: Based in Plovdiv, we travel to job sites anywhere in Bulgaria.
home.whyUsFullServiceText: From design to long-term maintenance — no need to juggle multiple contractors.
home.phaseDesignText: Risk analysis, technical design and documentation compliant with applicable regulations.
home.phaseBuildText: Installation and commissioning of fire detection, suppression and evacuation systems.
home.phaseMaintainText: Subscription maintenance, periodic inspections and inspection-readiness at all times.
home.servicesSubtitle: A complete range of fire safety services — from design to long-term maintenance.
home.sectorsTitle: We work with every type of facility
home.sectorsSubtitle: Every sector has specific requirements — we know them.
home.ctaBandSubtitle: Get in touch for a free consultation and quote.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: A licensed team with a proven track record in fire safety
about.introText: Fire Advisor designs, installs and maintains fire safety systems, with 8+ years of experience on the Bulgarian market. Based in Plovdiv, we work across sectors including manufacturing, retail, hospitality, healthcare and public buildings — nationwide.
about.credKiipText: Chamber of Engineers in Investment Design — a guarantee of professional design qualification.
about.credGdpznText: Permit for fire safety protection and maintenance of active fire safety measures — fire detection & extinguishing, smoke/heat extraction ventilation.
about.credExperienceText: Long-standing practical experience in designing and executing fire safety systems.
about.philosophyText: [TO BE REPLACED] We believe fire safety isn't a formality — it's a responsibility, both to the people using a building and to the owner managing it. That's why we approach every project individually, not with off-the-shelf templates.
